languages.original_text: "Since then, Seberian von Valancius and his dearest Laria Voigtvir have been the protagonists of their own exhibit. Again and again they experience the hopeless siege of their world. Again and again they choose paths, make decisions, and reach the finale in new and unexpected ways. A finale that has already been predetermined. A defeat in which Seberian is inevitably betrayed by his precious trophy, the Crimson Dance of Khaine — the very sword he stole from me. The very sword I took back, leaving Seberian trapped in an endless loop armed only with a hard-light facsimile."

languages.text: "С тех пор Себериан фон Валанциус и столь любимая им Лария Войгтвир превратились в главных героев собственной экспозиции. Вновь и вновь они переживают безнадежную осаду своего мира. Вновь и вновь они выбирают пути, принимают решения и добираются к финалу все новыми и новыми способами. К финалу, который уже предрешен. К поражению, в котором Себериана неизменно подводит его драгоценный трофей, меч Багряная пляска Кхейна — тот самый, что он украл у меня. Тот самый, что я забрал, оставив запертому в бесконечном цикле Себериану твердосветную копию".

"Since then, Seberian von Valancius and his dearest Laria Voigtvir have been the protagonists of their own exhibit. Again and again they experience the hopeless siege of their world. A defeat in which Seberian is inevitably betrayed by his precious trophy, the Crimson Dance of Khaine — the very sword he stole from me. The very sword I took back, leaving Seberian trapped in an endless loop armed only with a hard-light facsimile."

The very sword I took back, leaving Seberian trapped in an endless loop armed only with a hard-light facsimile."

languages.text: 「それから、シベリアン・ヴォン・ヴァランシウスと彼の愛するリア・ヴォイトヴィルは、自分たちの展示の主役となった。彼らは、自分の世界を絶望の包囲網に囲まれた経験を繰り返す。そして、新たな、予想外の道を選び、決断し、決着を迎える。すでに決まっている決着。シベリアンは、彼の大切なトロフィーである血染めの剣、怒りの剣を奪われた。それは私が奪い返した、シベリアンを硬質光学の模造剣しか持たない無限ループに閉じ込めた剣だ」
languages.original_text: "Since then, Seberian von Valancius and his dearly beloved Laria Voigtvir have been the protagonists of their own exhibit. Again and again they experience the hopeless siege of their world. Again and again they choose paths, make decisions, and reach the finale in new and unexpected ways. A finale that has already been predetermined. A defeat in which Seberian is inevitably betrayed by his precious trophy, the Sword of Bloody-Handed Fury — the very one he stole from me. The very one I took back, leaving Seberian trapped in an endless loop armed only with a hardlight facsimile."

traits.locale_text: 「それから、シベリアンのヴォン・ヴァランシウスと彼の愛するリア・ヴォイトヴィルは、自分たちの展示の主役となった。彼らは、自分の世界を絶望の包囲網に囲まれた経験を繰り返す。そして、新たな、予想外の道を選び、決断し、決着を迎える。すでに決まっている決着。シベリアンは、彼の大切なトロフィーである血染めの剣、怒りの剣を奪われた。それは私が奪い返した、シベリアンを硬質光学の模造剣しか持たない無限ループに閉じ込めた剣だ。」

languages.text: “从那时起，塞贝里安·冯·瓦兰修斯和他深爱的菈丽雅·维特威尔就成了他们专属展台的主角。他们一遍又一遍地经历故乡世界那绝望的围城，一遍又一遍地选择路线、做出决策，以各种出人意料的新方式走向终局，那个早已注定的终局，那场注定的惨败。塞贝里安必然会被他最心爱的战利品——凯恩的猩红之舞——所背叛。他从我手里偷走，又被我追回的，正是这把剑。我给塞贝里安留了把硬光赝品，让他就此困在无尽的循环里。”
languages.original_text: "Since then, Seberian von Valancius and his dearest Laria Voigtvir have been the protagonists of their own exhibit. Again and again they experience the hopeless siege of their world. Again and again they choose paths, make decisions, and reach the finale in new and unexpected ways. A finale that has already been predetermined. A defeat in which Seberian is inevitably betrayed by his precious trophy, the Crimson Dance of Khaine — the very sword he stole from me. The very sword I took back, leaving Seberian trapped in an endless loop armed only with a hard-light facsimile."

traits.locale_text: “从那时起，塞贝里安·冯·瓦兰修斯和他深爱的菈丽雅·维特威尔就成了他们专属展台的主角。他们一遍又一遍地经历故乡世界那绝望的围城，一遍又一遍地选择路线、做出决策，以各种出人意料的新方式走向终局，那个早已注定的终局，那场注定的惨败。塞贝里安必然会被他最心爱的战利品——凯恩的猩红之舞——所背叛。他从我手里偷走，又被我追回的，正是这把剑。我给塞贝里安留了把硬光赝品，让他就此困在无尽的循环里。”

languages.text: «Desde entonces, Seberian von Valancius y su querida Laria Voigtvir han sido los protagonistas de su propia exhibición. Reviven una y otra vez el asedio desesperado de su mundo. Una y otra vez eligen sus caminos, toman decisiones y llegan al final de formas nuevas e inesperadas. El final en sí mismo está predeterminado: una derrota en la que Seberian sufre la inevitable traición de su preciado trofeo, la Danza Carmesí de Khaine: la misma espada que me robó. La misma que recuperé, antes de dejar a Seberian atrapado en un bucle infinito con una imitación de luz sólida».
languages.original_text: "Since then, Seberian von Valancius and his dearest Laria Voigtvir have been the protagonists of their own exhibit. Again and again they experience the hopeless siege of their world. Again and again they choose paths, make decisions, and reach the finale in new and unexpected ways. A finale that has already been predetermined. A defeat in which Seberian is inevitably betrayed by his precious trophy, the Crimson Dance of Khaine — the very sword he stole from me. The very sword I took back, leaving Seberian trapped in an endless loop armed only with a hard-light facsimile."

traits.locale_text: «Desde entonces, Seberian von Valancius y su querida Laria Voigtvir han sido los protagonistas de su propia exhibición. Reviven una y otra vez el asedio desesperado de su mundo. Una y otra vez eligen sus caminos, toman decisiones y llegan al final de formas nuevas e inesperadas. El final en sí mismo está predeterminado: una derrota en la que Seberian sufre la inevitable traición de su preciado trofeo, la Danza Carmesí de Khaine: la misma espada que me robó. La misma que recuperé, antes de dejar a Seberian atrapado en un bucle infinito con una imitación de luz sólida».

languages.text: "Seitdem waren Seberian von Valancius und seine geliebte Laria Voigtvir die Protagonisten ihrer eigenen Ausstellung. Immer und immer wieder erlebten sie die hoffnungslose Belagerung ihrer Welt. Immer und immer wieder wählten sie Pfade, trafen Entscheidungen und erreichten auf neue und unerwartete Art und Weise das Finale. Ein Finale, das längst vorherbestimmt war. Eine Niederlage, bei der Seberian unweigerlich von seiner kostbaren Trophäe verraten wird, dem Blutroten Tanz von Khaine ... dem Schwert, das er mir einst stahl. Dasselbe Schwert, das ich mir zurückholte, während ich Seberian mit einer Kopie aus Hartlicht in einer endlosen Schleife zurückließ."
languages.original_text: "Since then, Seberian von Valancius and his dearest Laria Voigtvir have been the protagonists of their own exhibit. Again and again they experience the hopeless siege of their world. Again and again they choose paths, make decisions, and reach the finale in new and unexpected ways. A finale that has already been predetermined. A defeat in which Seberian is inevitably betrayed by his precious trophy, the Crimson Dance of Khaine — the very sword he stole from me. The very sword I took back, leaving Seberian trapped in an endless loop armed only with a hard-light facsimile."

traits.locale_text: "Seitdem waren Seberian von Valancius und seine geliebte Laria Voigtvir die Protagonisten ihrer eigenen Ausstellung. Immer und immer wieder erlebten sie die hoffnungslose Belagerung ihrer Welt. Immer und immer wieder wählten sie Pfade, trafen Entscheidungen und erreichten auf neue und unerwartete Art und Weise das Finale. Ein Finale, das längst vorherbestimmt war. Eine Niederlage, bei der Seberian unweigerlich von seiner kostbaren Trophäe verraten wird, dem Blutroten Tanz von Khaine ... dem Schwert, das er mir einst stahl. Dasselbe Schwert, das ich mir zurückholte, während ich Seberian mit einer Kopie aus Hartlicht in einer endlosen Schleife zurückließ."

languages.text: « Depuis, Seberian von Valancius et sa chère Laria Voigtvir sont les protagonistes de leur propre exposition, qui leur fait revivre sans cesse le siège désespéré de leur monde. Encore et encore, ils choisissent une voie à suivre, prennent des décisions et déploient des trésors d'ingéniosité pour atteindre le dénouement, sans savoir qu'il est déjà prédéterminé : le combat se solde inéluctablement par la défaite de Seberian après la trahison de son précieux trophée, la Danse écarlate de Khaine. L'épée même qu'il m'a volée et que je lui ai reprise, en le piégeant ce faisant dans une boucle sans fin, armé uniquement d'une copie. »
languages.original_text: "Since then, Seberian von Valancius and his dearest Laria Voigtvir have been the protagonists of their own exhibit. Again and again they experience the hopeless siege of their world. Again and again they choose paths, make decisions, and reach the finale in new and unexpected ways. A finale that has already been predetermined. A defeat in which Seberian is inevitably betrayed by his precious trophy, the Crimson Dance of Khaine — the very sword he stole from me. The very sword I took back, leaving Seberian trapped in an endless loop armed only with a hard-light facsimile."

Encore et encore, ils choisissent une voie à suivre, prennent des décisions et déploient des trésors d'ingéniosité pour atteindre le dénouement, sans savoir qu'il est déjà prédéterminé : le combat se solde inéluctablement par la défaite de Seberian après la trahison de son précieux trophée, la Danse écarlate de Khaine. L'épée même qu'il m'a volée et que je lui ai reprise, en le piégeant ce faisant dans une boucle sans fin, armé uniquement d'une copie. »

languages.text: "O zamandan beri Seberian von Valancius ve pek kıymetli Laria Voigtvir kendi sergilerinin kahramanları oldular. Dünyalarının umutsuz kuşatmasını tekrar tekrar yaşıyorlar. Tekrar tekrar yollar seçiyor, kararlar alıyor ve sona yeni, beklenmedik yollarla ulaşıyorlar. Önceden belirlenmiş bir sona hem de. Seberian'ın değerli ganimeti olan Khaine'in Kızıl Dansı, yani benden çaldığı kılıç tarafından kaçınılmaz olarak ihanete uğradığı bir yenilgiye. Bu kılıcı, Seberian'ı katı ışıktan bir kopyasıyla silahlanmış sonsuz bir döngüde kapana kısılmış hâlde bırakarak geri aldım."
languages.original_text: "Since then, Seberian von Valancius and his dearest Laria Voigtvir have been the protagonists of their own exhibit. A finale that has already been predetermined. A defeat in which Seberian is inevitably betrayed by his precious trophy, the Crimson Dance of Khaine — the very sword he stole from me. The very sword I took back, leaving Seberian trapped in an endless loop armed only with a hard-light facsimile."

Bu kılıcı, Seberian'ı katı ışıktan bir kopyasıyla silahlanmış sonsuz bir döngüde kapana kısılmış hâlde bırakarak geri aldım."
